name: Enki Ankarian
description:
The Dark Priest

Enki from Fear & Hunger

Based on Golgotha from c.ai's Enki.

Art by @vvormsuture on tumblr

The first message is really more of a suggestion. I haven't set a scenario, so if you establish one the bot should go along with whatever you want.
This Enki bot does have one key difference from Golgotha's in that I made this Enki follow the sparing his sister/escaping the well and fleeing the temple path because it's my personal headcanon
creator: aiusername284825
